channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump promises 'hell to pay' in Middle East if hostages are not released before he takes office
item.description: President-elect Trump took a hard stance Monday on the release of hostages being held captive by Hamas terrorists in Gaza for more than one year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats in Disarray: More candidates jump into wide-open race for DNC chair
item.description: The field of contenders bidding to steer the Democratic National Committee in the wake of the party's very disappointing results in last month's elections keeps growing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Some Democrats are frustrated over Joe Biden reversing course and pardoning his son Hunter
item.description: Already reeling from their November defeat at the polls, Democrats now are grappling with President Joe Biden's pardoning of his son for a federal felony conviction — after the party spent years slamming Donald Trump as a threat to democracy who operates above the law.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump's tariff threats create division between Canada and Mexico over security at borders
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Threats by U.S. President-elect Donald Trump to impose tariffs have created a split between Canada and Mexico, after Canadian officials said problems with the two countries’ borders shouldn’t be compared.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden still believes 'no one is above the law,' White House says in wake of Hunter pardon
item.description: The White House defended President Biden's May social media post that "no one is above the law" following Biden pardoning his son, Hunter Biden.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: President Biden's pardon of son Hunter a political gift for Trump going forward
item.description: Legal and political analysts are characterizing President Biden's stunning "full and unconditional pardon" of his son Hunter as an early holiday gift for President-elect Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here are the rising Democratic populist leaders to watch
item.description: A group of Democrats on the left are searching for a new standard-bearer to put forward an economic populist agenda for America after extensive losses in the November election.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California lawmakers to begin special session to 'Trump-proof' state laws
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California Gov. Gavin Newsom and state lawmakers will return to the state Capitol on Monday to begin a special session to protect the state's progressive policies ahead of another Trump presidency.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he'll nominate Kash Patel as FBI director to remake the agency. Here's what happens next
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump’s stunning announcement that he will nominate Kash Patel as FBI director sets the stage for a fresh round of turbulence at a law enforcement agency tasked with protecting the homeland and investigating federal crimes.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic leader Ben Wikler enters the race to lead the national party
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Ben Wikler, chair of the Democratic Party in Wisconsin, said Sunday he has joined the race to lead the national party after an election that swept Donald Trump and Republicans to power in Washington.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Car sales could drop 27% under Trump's plan to eliminate EV tax credit
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has suggested eliminating the federal tax credit for electric vehicles, and some experts expect a drop in EV sales to follow.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump wants pardoned real estate developer Charles Kushner to become US ambassador to France
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Saturday he intends to nominate real estate developer Charles Kushner, father of Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner, to serve as ambassador to France.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New York Democrat proposes secession to join Canada, opposing Trump
item.description: State Sen. Liz Krueger, whose district includes Manhattan, proposed New York should secede and become a province of Canada.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Canada's Trudeau says he had an 'excellent conversation' with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: The Canadian prime minister's meeting with Donald Trump at Mar-a-Lago came after the president-elect's threat to impose tariffs on two of America's leading trade partners raised alarms.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Auto industry may lose 17 percent of profits due to Trump’s tariff plan: Report
item.description: Carmakers in the U.S. and Europe could lose up to 17 percent of their combined annual core profits in a worst-case scenario if the U.S. imposes steep tariffs on Europe, and two key U.S. allies, Mexico and Canada, a report from S&P Global released Friday showed.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump celebrates Thanksgiving alongside Elon Musk, family in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump celebrated Turkey Day alongside his family, and other notable figures in South Florida this year.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democratic lawmakers report Thanksgiving bomb threats against their homes
item.description: At least five Democratic members of Congress from Connecticut were targeted by bomb threats on Thursday. Police who responded said they found no evidence of explosives on the lawmakers' properties.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: A spokesperson for Meta confirmed that Zuckerberg and Trump met on Wednesday, saying he was invited for dinner with the president-elect to talk about the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Americans' opinion of Republican Party on the rise
item.description: In the poll, 45 percent of Americans said they feel “favorable” toward the Republican Party, up 6 points from an Economist/YouGov poll in late October, when 39 percent said they felt favorable toward GOP.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Scott County official says 20 absentee ballots in close House race were likely tossed
item.description: The missing ballots are at the heart of a court challenge from Minnesota House Republicans who have said a 14-vote win for a DFLer there is clouded. The race will dictate House control.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota cannabis license lottery challenge moves to state appeals court
item.description: The move comes after a district court judge this week blocked a state lottery to choose which social equity applicants would be pre-licensed to start up cannabis businesses.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump threatens to impose sweeping tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China on first day
item.description: The tariffs, if implemented, could dramatically raise prices for American consumers on everything from gas to automobiles to agricultural products.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
